GracefulShutdownState.description: State model derived from GracefulShutdown TLA+ spec

TypeOK.message:
TypeOK violation: /\ shutdown_requested   \in BOOLEAN
    /\ in_flight            \subseteq Tasks
    /\ completed            \subseteq...
TypeOK.description: Verifier for invariant TypeOK from GracefulShutdown spec

NoNewAfterShutdown.description: Verifier for invariant NoNewAfterShutdown from GracefulShutdown spec

InFlightDoesNotGrow.description: Verifier for invariant InFlightDoesNotGrow from GracefulShutdown spec

InFlightCompletes.description: Verifier for invariant InFlightCompletes from GracefulShutdown spec

CompletedSubsetTasks.description: Verifier for invariant CompletedSubsetTasks from GracefulShutdown spec

Partitioned.description: Verifier for invariant Partitioned from GracefulShutdown spec

assert_TypeOK.condition:
and shutdown_requested   in BOOLEAN
    and in_flight            \subseteq Tasks
    and completed            \subseteq Tasks
    and started_after_signal \subseteq Tasks
    and in_flight_at_signal  \subseteq Tasks
    and pending              \subseteq Tasks
    and run_active           in BOOLEAN
assert_TypeOK.message:
Assertion failed: TypeOK — /\ shutdown_requested   \in BOOLEAN
    /\ in_flight            \subseteq Tasks
    /\ completed            \subseteq...
assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from GracefulShutdown spec

assert_NoNewAfterShutdown.description: Test assertion for NoNewAfterShutdown from GracefulShutdown spec

assert_InFlightDoesNotGrow.message: Assertion failed: InFlightDoesNotGrow — shutdown_requested => in_flight \subseteq in_flight_at_signal
assert_InFlightDoesNotGrow.description: Test assertion for InFlightDoesNotGrow from GracefulShutdown spec

assert_InFlightCompletes.description: Test assertion for InFlightCompletes from GracefulShutdown spec

assert_CompletedSubsetTasks.description: Test assertion for CompletedSubsetTasks from GracefulShutdown spec

assert_Partitioned.description: Test assertion for Partitioned from GracefulShutdown spec

test_scenarios.name: scenario_GracefulShutdown_NoNewAfterShutdown_0
test_scenarios.expected_outcome: NoNewAfterShutdown should hold but was violated at state 1
